steps.title: Read the bar heights
steps.content: First, read the bar heights from the graph: Letter A appears 50 times, Letter B appears 80 times, Letter C appears 40 times, Letter D appears 43 times.

steps.title: Find the letter with 80 occurrences
steps.content: The bar for Letter B reaches 80, which matches the target frequency. Therefore the letter that appears 80 times is B. That matches choice B — B is correct.
